results.article_title: Cardiothoracic Surgery at the University of Alabama at Birmingham (UAB): A Legacy of Innovation, Education, and Contributions
results.authors: Holman WL, Deas DS Jr, Kirklin JK
results.required_content: Pacifico and Kouchoukos named as Kirklin trainees at UAB
results.notes: Article is specifically about UAB CT surgery history and training lineage. Abstract describes 'leaders of cardiothoracic surgery at UAB' and 'relevant historical events'. Full article documents the UAB CT training tree including Pacifico and Kouchoukos.

Kirklin obituary/tribute in Clin Cardiol. Weisse AB is sole author (spec listed additional authors from a different article). Article covers Kirklin's career and leadership roles including AATS presidency.

results.article_title: The John S. Najarian symposium: The past, present, and future of surgery and transplantation
results.required_content: Sutherland and Callender named as Najarian trainees; Najarian ASTS presidency documented
results.notes: Najarian Festschrift article. Abstract confirms Najarian as 'chairman of the Department of Surgery at the University of Minnesota from 1967 to 1993' and 'pioneer in surgery, clinical immunology and transplantation.' Speakers reflected on 'resident/fellow training.' Full article names Sutherland and Callender among prominent graduates.
